positive: Minimalist abstract celestial forest scene. A grouping of silhouetted, bioluminescent trees and flowing, cosmic energy ribbons against a deep midnight blue and violet gradient background. The trees should have organic, stylized forms, resembling mandalas or crystallized roots. Incorporate subtle, glowing abstract geometric patterns that look like distant nebula clouds or stained glass. The composition must be perfectly balanced and centralized, ideal for full-chest apparel printing. Studio lighting quality, strong contrast, high detail, vector art aesthetic, UHD, graphic novel style.
